jsonLd.title: Instamojo is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Instamojo are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Instamojo:
Instamojo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
